song.title: O Light of Light Shine in
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) O Light of light, shine in! Cast out this night of sin, Create true day within: O Light of light, shine in!
[C] Chorus O Light, all light excelling, Make my heart Thy dwelling; O Joy, all grief dispelling, To my poor heart come in!
[V2] 2) O Joy of joys, come in! End Thou this grief of sin, Create calm peace within: O Joy of joys, come in!
[V3] 3) O Life of life, pour in! Expel this death of sin, Awake true life within: O Life of life, pour in!
[V4] 4) O Love of love, flow in! This hateful root of sin Deal with, renew, within: O Love of love, flow in!
[V5] 5) O Heaven of heavens, descend! This cloudy curtain rend, And all earth’s turmoil end: O Heaven of heavens descend!
[V6] 6) My God and Lord, O come! Of joys the Joy and Sum, Make in this heart Thy home: My God and Lord, O come!
song.author: Horatious Bonar
